effect.insurgence.overworld_curse.desc: Feel the curse of the Overworld
effect.insurgence.nether_curse.desc: Feel the heat of the Nether
effect.insurgence.end_curse.desc: Feel the strange air of the End
effect.insurgence.haven_blessing.desc: Feel the welcoming air of the Haven
effect.insurgence.starlight_curse.desc: You've entered the dangerous Starlight dimension.
effect.insurgence.secret_blessing.desc: Finding this ethereal sanctuary is a blessing in and of itself.
enchantment.insurgence.debug.all_attribu: An enchantment which grants +1 in every attribute. Used for debugging purposes.
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.title: Luck Bonus
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.desc: Increases your luck when you get more points from collecting cards of high rarity. Bonus luck will grant better loot! (Only the strongest bonus will apply)
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_1: With at least 300 points: grants 1 additional luck total
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_2: With at least 400 points: grants 3 additional luck total
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_3: With at least 500 points: grants 5 additional luck total
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_4: With at least 600 points: grants 7 additional luck total
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_5: With at least 700 points: grants 9 additional luck total
album.bonus.insurgence.luck.step_6: With at least 900 points: grants 11 additional luck total
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.desc: Increases your maximum health for every set of cards you have completed, regardless of rarity.
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.swor: By completing the Swords collection: grants 5 hearts
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.stav: By completing the Staves collection: grants 5 hearts
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.cups: By completing the Cups collection: grants 5 hearts
album.bonus.insurgence.set_complete.ring: By completing the Rings collection: grants 5 hearts

tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_fuel: Used to power the Nether Portal one time.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_1: Consumes Nether Fuel to allow temporary travel to The Nether.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_2: The portal will teleport you to a random location each time,
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_3: and it will teleport all entities in a 5 block radius together.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_4: Your visit to The Nether will be limited in time.
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_portal_5: When your time has run out, you will be teleported back to the Nether Portal.
tooltip.insurgence.info.unused_item: This is an unused item. It has no purpose.
tooltip.insurgence.info.haven_blessing_u: Consume this to increase the strength of the Haven's Blessing. Name WIP
tooltip.insurgence.info.overworld_curse_: Consume this to weaken the effects of the Overworld's Curse. Name WIP
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_curse_dow: Consume this to weaken the effects of the Nether's Curse. Name WIP
tooltip.insurgence.info.nether_time_upgr: Consume this to increase the amount of time you can spend in The Nether. Name WIP
tooltip.insurgence.info.end_curse_downgr: Consume this to weaken the effects of the End's Curse. Name WIP

tooltip.insurgence.lore.card_of_rings: Earned through a demonstration of Wealth.

tooltip.insurgence.lore.poking_stick: You may find that creatures do not enjoy being poked.
tooltip.insurgence.lore.heaviest_core: Jumping is for the those with strong legs. It is possible that yours are not strong enough.

Can only use this item on an inactive Vault.

Multiplier for the speed at which players can break blocks.

attribute.name.generic.burning_time.desc: How long you remain on fire after being ignited.
attribute.name.generic.explosion_knockba: Percentage of knockback from explosions resisted.
attribute.name.generic.fall_damage_multi: Multiplier for the amount of fall damage taken.
attribute.name.generic.gravity.desc: The amount of gravity affecting the player. Measured in blocks/tick^2.
attribute.name.generic.jump_strength.des: The initial vertical velocity when jumping. Measured in blocks/tick^2.
attribute.name.generic.max_absorption.de: The maximum amount of health that can be obtained from the absorption effect.
attribute.name.generic.movement_efficien: Factor to speed up movement on blocks which slow entities down.
attribute.name.generic.oxygen_bonus.desc: Increases the chance that air does not decrease underwater.
attribute.name.generic.safe_fall_distanc: The number of blocks before fall damage begins to accumulate.
attribute.name.generic.step_height.desc: The number of blocks that can be stepped up without jumping.
attribute.name.generic.water_movement_ef: Percentage of the player's movement speed when underwater.

questlog.main.insurgence.intro.title: Welcome to Insurgence II!
questlog.main.insurgence.intro.desc_1: This is an Adventure/RPG modpack with a focus on embracing Rogue-Lite gameplay loops.
questlog.main.insurgence.intro.desc_2: You can expect to die a lot in this pack. It has been balanced around that fact.
questlog.main.insurgence.intro.desc_3: Upon death, you will keep all of your items, but you will still drop your experience.
questlog.main.insurgence.intro.desc_4: Your progression, is measured by your current world tier.
questlog.main.insurgence.intro.desc_5: %s to read more about world tiers.
questlog.main.insurgence.skyblock_explan: You start your adventure in the Haven dimension, located high up above the Overworld
Most of your time will be spent here, since visiting other dimensions (even the Overworld!) has become very dangerous.
This pack has been designed around the Haven being your hub.
Other than the fact that you start in the sky, this is not a skyblock pack.
questlog.main.insurgence.dimension_effec: The Blessings and Curses of Every Realm.
Every dimension in this pack gives a custom status effect.
Most of these effects are debuffs, but being in the Haven grants buffs instead
You can read about the specific effects in the corresponding dimension's chapter in this questbook.
The debuffs are harsh, but it is possible to reduce the harm they cause.
%s to read about how to do this.
questlog.main.insurgence.permanent_bonus: It is possible to buff your character by cooking up special dishes.
Some of these buffs give stat bonuses, some improve abilities, and some increase resistance to dimensional effects.
%s to read about what dimensional effects are.
Another way to get some permanent buffs are by collecting tarot cards in an album.
%s to read about the Collector's Album.
questlog.world_tiers.insurgence.intro.de: To measure your progression, this pack uses Apotheosis' world tiers system.
However, the world tiers have been heavily customized.
Your current world tier has certain effects on both yourself and other mobs.
Additionally, each world tier will increase the quality of the loot you find in chests.
You can see the specific bonuses of your current world tier by opening the Apotheosis world tier menu.
To progress between world tiers, you will need to complete the quests in this chapter,
and once you have completed them all, your world tier will upgrade automatically.
questlog.world_tiers.insurgence.haven.de: The beginning of a brand new adventure; your sanctuary in the sky.
This is the world tier you start with. It provides no bonuses inherently.
It only gets better from here.
questlog.world_tiers.insurgence.apoth_ar: Obtain a Full Set of Affixed Armor
questlog.skies.insurgence.dimensional_ef: The dimensional effect of this dimension is a small buff.
The buffs provided by the Haven's Blessing can be improved later.
%s if you don't know about dimensional effects.
The base effects the Haven provides are:
questlog.skies.insurgence.punch_wood.tit: Punch Wood, Make a Crafting Table.
questlog.skies.insurgence.punch_wood.des: Hopefully you don't need any help with this part.
questlog.skies.insurgence.activate_wayst: You may have noticed the %s located on your island.
Interacting with that block will summon some hostile enemies which,
when defeated, will convert that block into a Waystone!
In case you aren't aware, Waystones allow fast travel between unlocked locations.
In this modpack, Waystones will always cost experience to travel,
unless you are travelling to or from the Haven dimension.
Activating the Waystone will grant you some bones and gold, which will prove very useful.
Now that you have the waystone activated, you should jump off the island to land in the overworld.
You will be safe from fall damage when travelling between the Haven and the Overworld.
The Overworld is dangerous, so you will want to come back.
One way to return is by finding another Waystone in the Overworld, which has the same activation steps as the one before.
Another way is by dying. It is important to note that you keep your items when you die.
